allow: Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 5.7/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -p123456 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 competition_db -e "SELECT f_status, COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM t_competition GROUP BY f_status; SELECT f_status, COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM t_project GROUP BY f_status; SELECT f_status, COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM t_paper GROUP BY f_status;")
